# Important changes

**Last updated**: 2026-04-02

Always review important or breaking changes and remediation recommendations
before upgrading Vault.

## Breaking changes

[Azure auth](/vault/docs/auth/azure) now gives values set in `auth/azure/config`
precedence over `AZURE_*` environment variables, so review deployments that
relied on environment variables overriding stored configuration.


---

## New behavior

None.


---

## Known issues

None.
